blogPost.notFoundTitle: Article not found - Career Studio Blog

landing.headline: Land your dream job with an ATS-proof resume
landing.subheadline: Career Studio brings AI-powered resume building, ATS checks, LKR salary context, and job-search workflows into one focused platform for Sri Lankan job seekers.
landing.featuresTitle: Move from resume draft to confident application
landing.featuresDescription: The Django pilot focused on practical career tasks. Phase 1 keeps that behavior visible while the Next.js feature modules come online.
landing.templatesTitle: Basic, Pro, and Premium resume tiers
landing.templatesDescription: The template model carries over the original Sri Lanka-focused pricing and tier structure, ready for the full resume engine phase.
landing.ctaTitle: Build the first version, then improve it with ATS feedback
landing.ctaDescription: Use the public tools to understand the workflow, then sign in when the migrated editor and AI flows land in the next phases.

pricing.title: Invest in your career growth
pricing.description: Choose the plan that matches your job search. Paid tiers are shown as deliberate coming-soon offers until billing is migrated.
pricing.noteBody: Prices are presented in LKR by default. Stripe billing will be connected in a later phase, so paid plan buttons stay disabled for now.

tools.title: Career tools for every step of the search
tools.description: Build resumes, score ATS readiness, draft cover letters, audit LinkedIn, and discover local learning paths from one public showcase.
tools.proTitle: Premium tools stay visible, not fake-linked
tools.proDescription: The Django showcase included several planned tools. This port keeps those cards clear and disabled until their app routes are fully migrated.

resources.title: Guides, templates, and learning materials
resources.description: Practical resources for resumes, interviews, LinkedIn, job applications, and workplace decisions in Sri Lanka.
resources.ctaTitle: Public resources now, saved libraries later
resources.ctaDescription: The resource library has a static public surface in Phase 1. Downloads, annotations, and saved resources move into the authenticated phases.

courses.title: Find courses, diplomas, and practical tools by pathway
courses.description: A static first pass of the Sri Lankan education directory seeded from the Django management commands.

courseDiplomas.title: Career-focused diploma pathways
courseDiplomas.description: Diplomas and higher diplomas for learners who want practical progression into technology, business, HR, and management roles.

courseTools.title: AI and productivity tools for learning and applying
courseTools.description: A compact version of the Django tools directory, focused on practical tools job seekers can use immediately.

courseCities.title: Compare course hubs around Sri Lanka
courseCities.description: Browse the cities and districts that anchor the local course and diploma directory.

courseSaved.title: Keep a shortlist of courses and tools
courseSaved.description: The Django public view rendered an empty state for signed-out users; this keeps that behavior for Phase 1.
courseSaved.emptyDescription: Sign in to save courses, diplomas, cities, and tools once authenticated course actions are migrated.

blog.title: Insights for the modern professional
blog.description: Resume strategies, ATS advice, salary context, and interview guidance for Sri Lankan job seekers.
blog.empty: No posts found for those filters.

signIn.title: Sign in - Career Studio
signIn.description: Sign in to Career Studio with Google or a secure email link.

signUp.title: Create account - Career Studio
signUp.description: Create a Career Studio account and start building ATS-ready resumes for Sri Lankan job searches.

reset.title: Account recovery - Career Studio
reset.description: Request a secure Career Studio recovery link by email.

verifyRequest.title: Check your email - Career Studio
verifyRequest.description: Check your inbox for your secure Career Studio sign-in link.

settings.title: Settings - Career Studio
settings.description: Manage your Career Studio profile, account email, plan, quotas, and referral code.

terms.title: Terms of Service - Career Studio
terms.description: Career Studio terms for using the migrated Next.js platform.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy - Career Studio
privacy.description: Career Studio privacy notes for account, profile, resume, and job-search data.

auth.signInShellSubtitle: Continue building resumes, checking ATS fit, and tracking career progress from one Sri Lanka-first workspace.
auth.signUpShellSubtitle: Create a free account and get a secure email verification link before the full feature modules come online.
auth.resetShellSubtitle: Email sign-in links replace password reset flows in this Auth.js migration.
auth.featureAiBody: Improve summaries, bullets, cover letters, and interview answers with guided Gemini workflows.
auth.featureAtsBody: Score resumes against job descriptions and improve keyword coverage before applying.
auth.featureTemplatesBody: The resume template tiers and Sri Lankan pricing model carry forward from the Django pilot.
auth.featureFreeBody: Basic tools stay available while Pro and Premium gates are introduced deliberately.
auth.featurePrivateBody: Profile and career data are tied to your UUID user account and protected routes.
auth.featureSetupBody: Start with email, Google, optional referral code, and a lightweight profile.
auth.signInSubtitle: Use Google or request a secure email link. No password is stored for email sign-in.
auth.signUpSubtitle: We will email a verification link so you can finish signing in safely.
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter your email and we will send a secure link to continue.
auth.verifyBody: If the address is valid, a secure Career Studio link is on the way. In development without Resend, the link is printed in the server console.

errors.default: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.invalid: Please check the form and try again.
errors.google-unconfigured: Google sign-in is not configured in this environment yet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, profile, plan, quotas, and referral details.
settings.referralsBody: Invite friends and earn Pro template access as referrals join Career Studio.
settings.signOutBody: End the current session and return to the public site.
settings.deleteBody: Permanent deletion will be implemented after data export and audit flows are migrated.

planCopy.basic: Basic includes starter quotas for exports, ATS checks, and AI usage.
planCopy.pro: Pro raises quotas for active job seekers applying across multiple roles.
planCopy.premium: Premium is intended for high-volume users who need near-unlimited access.

saved.email: Email updated successfully. Please verify the new address before relying on it for account recovery.

errors.default: Something went wrong. Please check the form and try again.
errors.profile: Profile details could not be saved. Check the phone number and LinkedIn URL.
errors.email-taken: That email address is already in use.

legal.termsDescription: A lightweight Phase 2 placeholder for the public sign-up flow.
legal.termsBodyOne: Career Studio is being migrated from Django to Next.js in phases. Features may be incomplete until their phase is delivered.
legal.termsBodyTwo: Use the platform responsibly and only upload documents you are allowed to process.
legal.termsBodyThree: Paid plans and billing actions remain disabled until Stripe flows are migrated in a later phase.
legal.privacyDescription: A lightweight Phase 2 placeholder for account and profile data handling.
legal.privacyBodyOne: Career Studio stores account, profile, resume, and job-search data against a UUID user account.
legal.privacyBodyTwo: Uploaded files and AI features will use Supabase Storage and Gemini-backed services as later phases come online.
legal.privacyBodyThree: Deletion, export, and detailed consent flows are deferred until the related data modules are migrated.

jobTracker.subtitle: Track applications through the full hiring pipeline, keep follow-up dates visible, and measure response momentum.

interview.subtitle: Browse the Sri Lanka-aware question bank, practise answers, and get structured AI coaching.
interview.answerPlaceholder: Write or dictate your answer here.

salary.title: Salary Insights
salary.subtitle: Calculate local salary ranges in LKR and compare purchasing power across Sri Lankan cities.
salary.lkrBody: Seeded salary rows use LKR and show annual ranges for Sri Lankan roles.
salary.colBody: Cost-of-living indices are relative to Colombo as the 100 baseline.
salary.privacyBody: Small samples are withheld until enough data exists to protect individuals.

careerGps.title: Career GPS
careerGps.subtitle: Generate a practical weekly roadmap from your profile, goals, constraints, and local resources.
careerGps.profilePlaceholder: Paste your CV summary, current skills, projects, and work experience.
careerGps.emptyPlanBody: Complete the wizard to generate a Career GPS plan with milestones, weekly tasks, and local resources.

linkedin.title: LinkedIn Optimizer
linkedin.subtitle: Audit a LinkedIn profile against a target role, then generate section rewrites and a recruiter checklist.
linkedin.profileText: Paste LinkedIn profile text or CV context
linkedin.emptyHistoryBody: Upload a profile export or paste profile text to create your first audit.
linkedin.stepUpload: Upload a LinkedIn PDF or paste extracted profile text.
linkedin.stepAnalyze: Score completeness, keywords, readability, impact, consistency, and findability.
linkedin.stepRewrite: Generate role-focused rewrites for headline, about, and experience sections.
linkedin.auditResultSubtitle: Review missing keywords, checklist items, and rewrite options.
linkedin.headline: Headline
